texts.heroSub: A private space just for the two of us
texts.tlDesc_1: Write your story here — how you met, what happened, how you felt.
texts.tlDesc_2: Describe your first adventure. Where did you go?
texts.tlDesc_3: Your first anniversary. What did you do?
texts.tlDesc_4: This story isn't finished. Add new entries as you make more memories.
texts.noteText_1: I love the way you laugh at your own jokes before you even finish telling them.
texts.noteText_2: Thank you for always knowing when I need silence and when I need you to talk to me.
texts.noteText_3: I never thought a regular Tuesday could be my favorite day. Then I started spending them with you.
texts.bucket_1: Watch a sunset on the beach together
texts.bucket_3: Get lost in a new city with no plan
texts.bucket_5: Go on a train journey through the mountains
texts.bucket_6: Stay in a tiny cabin in the middle of nowhere
texts.bucket_7: Cook a fancy 3-course dinner at home
texts.bucket_8: Watch all our favorite childhood movies
texts.bucket_9: Take a dance class even if we are terrible
texts.bucket_10: Write letters to our future selves
texts.bucket_11: Go stargazing far from the city lights
texts.bucket_12: Plant something together and watch it grow
texts.footerSub: Made with love · just for the two of us

notes.text: I love the way you laugh at your own jokes before you even finish telling them.
Thank you for always knowing when I need silence and when I need you to talk to me.
I never thought a regular Tuesday could be my favorite day. Then I started spending them with you.
